ongoing electrical and ECM communication issues with my 2018 Nissan NV2500. The vehicle is experiencing serious fault codes involving loss of communication with the ECM/PCM and transmission control systems, creating a potential safety concern and reliability issue. The diagnostic
Engine developed a knock and associated power issues as per Nissan technical bulletin NTB 19-057a. Nissan did not make owners of the affected VIN numbers aware of the issue.
The sliding door continually gets stuck and won’t open from the inside or outside often.

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2018 NISSAN NV200. THE CONTACT STATED WHILE HE WAS REVERSING THE VEHICLE, THE REAR VIEW CAMERA IMAGINE WAS BLINKING ON AND OFF, CAUSING HIS REAR BUMPER TO IMPACT A HILL. THE CONTACT STATED THE BUMPER WAS DISLOCATED. THE CONTACT STATED NO WARNING LIGHT WAS I

narrative.headline: What 2018 Nissan Nv200 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 8 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (25% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
